sections.name: Oratio
lines: O God, Who surround and protect us with the glorious profession of blessed Theodore, Your Martyr, grant us to profit by imitating him and to rejoice in his intercession.

sections.name: Secreta
lines: Accept, O Lord, the prayers and sacrificial gifts of Your faithful people, that, through these rites of love and devotion we may pass over to the glory of heaven.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: Grant, we beseech You, O Lord, by the intercession of blessed Theodore, Your Martyr, that what we taste with our lips we may consume with a pure heart.
